description: Translate nodes. The node positions are translated by v , and the optional range is applied to nodes. If the set keyword is not given, then the current set is used.

keywords.name: tolerance
keywords.description: The < tolerance ft > option provides tolerance for merging nodes. Default tolerance is 1.0e-8 multiplied by biggest extent size of all nodes positions in the set.
